name: Grilled Porcini and Batavian Lettuce With
recipeInstructions:
Preparation of the Cranberry Beans:
Place all ingredients except salt in a heavy saucepan. Bring to boil over high heat, then simmer slowly for 20 minutes. Add salt and finish cooking for about 5-10 minutes.
Cool beans in juice. Once cold, remove aromatics and beans. Refrigerate beans, keeping cooking juices.
Preparation of the Lettuce:
Slice Pancetta as thin as possible on a meat slicer. Wrap lettuce with Pancetta. Heat olive oil in a heavy skillet until it smokes lightly. Add wrapped lettuce and garlic cloves, reducing heat to cook until golden brown. Remove from oil and reserve at room temperature. Discard half of the oil and garlic. Reserve remaining oil.
Preparation of the Porcini Mushrooms:
Slice cleaned mushrooms into thick slices. Season well and brush with olive oil. Grill both sides until tender (about 3 minutes per side). Keep warm.
Preparation of the Vinaigrette:
Heat oil from cooking lettuce in a skillet, add oregano leaves until they fry. Add brown chicken sauce, sherry vinegar, and remaining olive oil. Serve hot over mushrooms, beans, and lettuce.
Yield: 4 servings
